TikTok Shop Creator Network

We turn TikTok content into commission, GMV, and real brand deals.

What we do

Everything a TikTok Shop brand or creator needs, in one network.

All services →

Creator Management

Content strategy, brand relationships, negotiation, and career growth handled by a dedicated team.

TikTok Shop Enablement

Shop setup, listings, pricing, and inventory hygiene, plus LIVE shopping production built to convert.

Affiliate & Commission

Open and Targeted Collaboration deals, negotiated commission tiers, GMV tracked by creator.

Brand Campaigns

Creator matching, briefs, content approval, and performance reporting for brand partners.

UGC Production

Rights-cleared, brand-safe UGC at scale for paid social, product pages, and organic content.

Payouts & Reporting

Transparent commission tracking and on-time payouts, with real-time campaign reporting.

Campaigns built around GMV, not vanity metrics.
